content.problemStatement:
What will we get when the code is executed?

```c
#include

int main() {
    int num = 8;
    if (num % 2 == 0)
        printf("Even number\n");
    return 0;
}
```

Option 1: Error
```default
Expected ':' in condition after if
```
Option 2: Error
```default
Cannot use '%' operator with integers
```

Option 3: Error
```default
Function 'printf' is undefined in C
```

Option 4: No error code will compile correctly with the following output
```default
Even number
```
